articles.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
articles.summary: OpenAI released prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using its gpt-oss-safeguard model, aiming to make age-appropriate protections easier to deploy across real-world AI products.

articles.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
articles.summary: OpenAI said its Foundation expects to invest at least $1 billion over the next year across disease research, jobs and economic impact, AI resilience, and community programs.

articles.title: Powering Product Discovery in ChatGPT
articles.summary: OpenAI rolled out a richer shopping experience in ChatGPT with visual browsing, side-by-side comparisons, and expanded Agentic Commerce Protocol support for product discovery.

articles.title: ChatGPT and Gemini are fighting to be the AI bot that sells you stuff
articles.summary: The Verge reports that Google and OpenAI are both pushing deeper into AI-assisted shopping, with Gemini adding Gap checkout flows and ChatGPT upgrading its product discovery experience.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Claude Code and Cowork can control your computer
articles.summary: Anthropic expanded Claude’s autonomous computer-use features into Claude Code and Cowork, letting the tools open files, use apps, browse the web, and run dev tools on a paired Mac.

articles.title: Anthropic hands Claude Code more control, but keeps it on a leash
articles.summary: Anthropic added a more autonomous auto mode to Claude Code, letting it execute more steps with fewer approvals while keeping guardrails in place for risky actions.

articles.title: Databricks bought two startups to underpin its new AI security product
articles.summary: Databricks acquired Antimatter and SiftD.ai to strengthen a new AI security offering, signaling that model governance and enterprise data protection are becoming core infrastructure bets.

articles.title: Arm is releasing the first in-house chip in its 35-year history
articles.summary: Arm is building its first in-house CPU, developed with Meta as an initial customer, underscoring how AI demand is reshaping the chip stack beyond traditional licensing.

articles.title: OpenAI’s plans to make ChatGPT more like Amazon aren’t going so well
articles.summary: OpenAI is reportedly pulling back from Instant Checkout inside ChatGPT, suggesting the path from conversational discovery to seamless in-chat commerce is still rough.

articles.title: Google TV’s new Gemini features keep fans updated on sports teams and more
articles.summary: Google is expanding Gemini on Google TV with sports updates, deep dives, and visual answers, pushing generative AI further into everyday living-room interfaces.

articles.title: 이정현 "지도부와 철저히 거리 유지…결과로 평가받겠다"
articles.summary: 이정현 "지도부와 철저히 거리 유지…결과로 평가받겠다".

articles.title: 이 대통령 “양극화 가장 큰 문제…노동계 단결 통해 힘의 균형 회복해야”
articles.summary: 이 대통령 “양극화 가장 큰 문제…노동계 단결 통해 힘의 균형 회복해야”.

articles.title: 5월 1일 '근로자의 날' 법정공휴일로…공무원도 유급으로 쉰다
articles.summary: 5월 1일 '근로자의 날' 법정공휴일로…공무원도 유급으로 쉰다.

articles.title: 제주에 유아 전용 기후환경교육관 생긴다…내년 1월 개관
articles.summary: 제주도가 2026년 유아기후환경교육관 신규 조성 사업 대상지로 선정됐다. 봉개동 환경교육센터 내 공간을 체험형 교육시설로 바꿔, 유아가 오감으로 기후변화와 탄소중립을 배우는 거점을 2027년 1월까지 마련할 계획이다.

articles.title: '혈액 낭비 요인' 헌혈 간기능검사, 36년 만에 폐지 추진
articles.summary: 보건복지부가 혈액관리법 시행규칙 개정을 통해 헌혈 간기능(ALT) 검사를 폐지하는 방안을 추진한다. 민감도가 높은 핵산증폭검사 도입으로 필요성이 줄었고, 최근 5년간 폐기 혈액의 약 32%가 이 검사 때문에 버려졌다는 점이 배경이다.

articles.title: Anthropic says Claude can now use your computer to finish tasks for you in AI agent push
articles.summary: Anthropic expanded Claude into a more agentic assistant that can operate apps, browsers, and spreadsheets from a paired computer after a task is sent from mobile, while keeping permission prompts and safety guardrails in place.

articles.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
articles.summary: Anthropic introduced Claude Code Review for enterprise teams, using multiple agents to inspect pull requests, rank logic issues, and reduce the review bottleneck created by AI-generated code.

articles.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers
articles.summary: Major cloud vendors said Anthropic models would stay available for non-defense workloads even after the Pentagon labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, limiting the fallout largely to defense-related use cases.

articles.title: Anthropic upgrades Claude’s memory to attract AI switchers
articles.summary: Anthropic opened Claude’s memory feature to free users and added an import flow for bringing context from rival chatbots, lowering the switching cost for users moving over from ChatGPT or Gemini.

articles.title: Auto mode for Claude Code
articles.summary: Anthropic launched a research-preview auto mode for Claude Code that lets the model approve lower-risk actions on a developer’s behalf while a safety classifier blocks destructive or suspicious commands.
